name: prepare
title: Prepare Transaction
description:
Prepare a Convex transaction for signing. Returns a hash to pass to 'signAndSubmit' or 'submit'.

Common source patterns:
- Transfer coins: (transfer #DEST_ADDR AMOUNT)
- Check balance: *balance*
- Deploy actor: (deploy '(do (defn greet [x] (str "Hello " x)) (export greet)))
- Call actor function: (call #ACTOR_ADDR (function-name arg1 arg2))
- Define value: (def my-var 42)
- Set controller: (set-controller #CONTROLLER_ADDR)
- Register CNS: (call #9 (cns-update 'my.name *address*))

Workflow: prepare -> signAndSubmit (or prepare -> sign -> submit for separate signing)

source.description: Convex Lisp source code for the transaction. See description for common patterns.

address.description: Origin account address (e.g. '#11' or '11'). Transaction executes from this account.

sequence.description: Optional explicit sequence number; defaults to current account sequence + 1

source.description: Original source expression that was prepared

address.description: Address that will execute the transaction

hash.description: Transaction hash - pass this to signAndSubmit or submit

sequence.description: Sequence number used for this transaction
